content_of_post_to_comment:
Reddit is cooler than many digital media since people integrate more, but that's addictive precisely because it's better.

So I just gathered the strength to delete my profile.

I wish extra energy to everyone who also wants to get off social media ✨
comment: Deleting the profile is probably the easy part; the weird moment is realizing how often your brain reaches for the app out of habit. Reddit being genuinely interesting makes it harder than just quitting mindless scrolling. I’ve found the empty spaces after leaving are where you notice what you were actually looking for online.
